title: Simulation mismatches in RTL vs post synthesis netlist(Yosys generated) co_simulation

### **Description:**

There is simulation mismatches in RTL vs post synthesis netlist co_simulation (same input stimulus provided to both rtl and netlist and outputs are compared)

In this design (Multiply mode):
a = a_int;
b = b_int;

Lets look at the time 210ns, here feedback is 001, when feedback is 001, we should have:

mult_a = a_int;
mult_b = b_int;

See line 165 DSP38: https://github.com/os-fpga/FPGA_PRIMITIVES_MODELS/blob/main/sim_models/verilog/DSP38.v#L165

But in the simulation we can see this is not happening for netlist(For RTL design it does happen, even though simulation model DSP38 is same for both rtl and netlist)

In the waveform the signals shown are of netlist:
**Observed Result:**
mult_a = 00000
mult_b = 3F6D3

resulting mult_out = 00000

**Expected Result:**
whereas it should have been

mult_a = A595B
mult_b = 2AE3F

resulting in mult_out = 0774A1D765(We get this value in RTL which is correct, but not getting this in netlist)

**Waveform:**
![Screenshot from 2024-07-23 16-25-36](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/65fee6a6-dbff-4823-8460-2adeb4b954ef)

**Testcase:**
[Iverilog.tar.gz](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/16359079/Iverilog.tar.gz)


**Steps to reproduce:**
1. iverilog -g2012 rtl/GJC4.v sim/co_sim_tb/co_sim_GJC4.v  *.v
2. vvp a.out
